Uses of Class
neqsim.process.safety.overpressure.ComplianceFinding

Packages that use ComplianceFinding
Package
Description
neqsim.process.safety.overpressure
 

  • Uses of ComplianceFinding in neqsim.process.safety.overpressure

    Methods in neqsim.process.safety.overpressure that return types with arguments of type ComplianceFinding
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<ComplianceFinding>
    TR3001ComplianceChecker.check(OverpressureStudyResult result)
    Evaluates the supplied study result and returns the list of compliance findings.
    Method parameters in neqsim.process.safety.overpressure with type arguments of type ComplianceFinding
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    TR3001ComplianceChecker.checkAcceptance(OverpressureStudyResult result, List<ComplianceFinding> findings)
    Checks the accumulated-pressure acceptance limit (TR3001 section 2 / ASME VIII Div 1 UG-125).
    private void
    TR3001ComplianceChecker.checkCapacity(OverpressureStudyResult result, List<ComplianceFinding> findings)
    Checks that the relief device capacity is adequate for the governing case (TR3001 section 4.6).
    private void
    TR3001ComplianceChecker.checkCredibleScenarios(OverpressureStudyResult result, List<ComplianceFinding> findings)
    Checks that at least one credible overpressure cause is documented (TR3001 section 4.7).
    private void
    TR3001ComplianceChecker.checkDynamicDetermination(OverpressureStudyResult result, List<ComplianceFinding> findings)
    Checks whether dynamic determination of the relief load was considered for the governing case (TR3001 SR-26565).
    private void
    TR3001ComplianceChecker.checkFireBasis(OverpressureStudyResult result, List<ComplianceFinding> findings)
    Checks that a fire governing case uses the 21% accumulation basis (TR3001 section 4.7.8 / API 521 4.4.13).
    private void
    TR3001ComplianceChecker.checkGoverningCase(OverpressureStudyResult result, List<ComplianceFinding> findings)
    Checks that the governing relief case is selected and documented (TR3001 section 4.4 / API 521 4.4).
    static String
    TR3001ComplianceChecker.findingsToJson(List<ComplianceFinding> findings)
    Serializes a list of compliance findings to a human-readable JSON array for results.json reporting.
    boolean
    TR3001ComplianceChecker.isCompliant(List<ComplianceFinding> findings)
    Returns true when none of the findings is a ComplianceStatus.FAIL.
